name: lithium
author: Lithium contributors
description: Lithium CLI for chat-first research automation

scripts.build: tsup src/cli/index.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist --external node-pty --external playwright-core --external node:sqlite --clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('dist/index.cjs'))fs.renameSync('dist/index.cjs','dist/cli.cjs')"
